title: pinus fenzeliana subsp. annamiensis
intro: Pinus fenzeliana subsp. annamiensis, also known as Chinese fir, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The resin of Pinus fenzeliana subsp. annamiensis has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of terpenes and flavonoids. Studies have shown that this plant has various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-cancer, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a potential candidate for treating various diseases. Pinus fenzeliana subsp. annamiensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote respiratory health and relieve coughs.
